html:
The Spear is a Melee Weapon crafted from the Fight Tab. It requires 1 Flint, 1 Rope, and 2 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can also be found near the walled area where the Box Thing lies.

The Spear's Durability allows for 150 hits, meaning each hit will reduce it by 0.66%.

Usage

×2

×3

×3

×4

×4

Trivia

  • The Spear was added in the (unnamed) October 2nd, 2012 update.
  • In the old research system, the Spear used to cost 100 Science Points to craft and had a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine.
  • An unused spear attack animation called "spearjab" would have been used for the Spear instead of the normal attack animation, if it were not removed. This animation is used by the Fencing Sword that was added later.

Gallery

  • Wilson figurine with a Spear.
  • Wilson doing the previously unused Spear jab animation.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“That's one pointy stick.”
–Wilson
“Feel my jabby wrath!”
–Willow
“It gave me a sliver.”
–Wolfgang
“They who wield it shall become the destroyer of worlds.”
–Wendy
“BRING IT, FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“Ancient weapons technology.”
–Wickerbottom
“It lacks the heft of a good solid axe.”
–Woodie
“It's a spear. Yup.”
–Maxwell
“Not incredibly effective weapon, but it has other uses.”
–Wagstaff
“It is nöt my favöred spear, but it will dö the trick.”
–Wigfrid
“We should stick things with the pointy part.”
–Webber
“For stabbing problems.”
–Walani
“For kebab-ing.”
–Warly
“I could jabber on wit' this all day.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA SHAKETH THIS SPEAR”
–Wilba
“Sharp stick”
–Wormwood
“Looks sharp. Sharp could come in handy around here.”
–Wheeler
“So crude.”
–Winona
“For defense only, I promise.”
–Wortox
“Stabby stick!”
–Wurt
“It has a point... heh...”
–Walter
“Don't think I won't use it if I have to!”
–Wanda
The Spear is a Melee Weapon crafted from the Fight Tab. It requires 1 Flint, 1 Rope, and 2 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can also be found near the walled area where the Box Thing lies.
The Spear's Durability allows for 150 hits, meaning each hit will reduce it by 0.66%.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Spear was added in the (unnamed) October 2nd, 2012 update.
In the old research system, the Spear used to cost 100 Science Points to craft and had a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine.
An unused spear attack animation called "spearjab" would have been used for the Spear instead of the normal attack animation, if it were not removed. This animation is used by the Fencing Sword that was added later.

The '''Spear''' is a [[Weapon#Melee weapons|Melee Weapon]] crafted from the [[Fight|Fight Tab]]. It requires 1 [[Flint]], 1 [[Rope]], and 2 [[Twigs]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It can also be found near the walled area where the [[Box Thing]] lies.

The Spear's [[Durability]] allows for 150 hits, meaning each hit will reduce it by 0.66%.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Spear was added in the (unnamed) [[New Features#October 2.2C 2012.5B18.5D|October 2nd, 2012]] update.
* In the old [[Research points list|research system]], the Spear used to cost 100 Science Points to craft and had a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a [[Science Machine]].
* An unused spear attack animation called "spearjab" would have been used for the Spear instead of the normal attack animation, if it were not removed. This animation is used by the [[Fencing Sword]] that was added later.
